docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $159) SERVED FEB-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARANTITIS, KAREN
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-14-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-07-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, NATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2022 - CONTINUED FOR CURING OF SERVICE TO APR-13-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WILL BE PRESENT VIA ZOOM NEXT APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF NATHAN BROWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAREN SARANTITIS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,333.00 FILED BY BROWN, NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT SARANTITIS, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, NATHAN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER CONTINUED FOR CURING OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-05-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS REACHED FOR $409.00 (WHICH INCLUDES COURT COSTS). DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF BY APRIL 30, 2022.(PRIORITY MAIL) NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. AN APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT ARE NOT MET AND A JUDGMENT SHALL BE ISSUED. $100.00 PENALTY FEE WILL BE ASSESSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF NATHAN BROWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAREN SARANTITIS IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
